Figure 2 Our transfer learning setup for Forge applied to SAT to enable unsupervised SAT representations. (I) convert SAT instances into MIP form. (II) construct either MIP or SAT node feature. (III) bipartite representation, with MIP or SAT node features, are fed into Forge architecture trained on MIP or SAT instances. Overall, we obtain SAT representations (embeddings) at the instance-, clause-, and variable level.
Figure 3 Clustering SAT embeddings across static and different transfer learning featurizations.
